brand.title: LangBoost
brand.subtitle: Japanese & English Speaking Platform
settings.title: Account & Goal Settings
settings.langConfigDesc: Choose your display language and learning target
home.submitDone: Mock exam completed. Switched to mistakes view.
home.goalFailed: Failed to save goal. Please try again.
home.confirmLeaveExam: Mock exam not submitted yet. Leave anyway?
home.confirmLeavePractice: Practice session not completed. Leave anyway?
login.brandDesc: Shadowing, mock exams, mistake review, vocabulary — improve your Japanese and English speaking skills in one place.
login.feature1: Japanese shadowing + daily news + YouTube import
login.feature2: Full-length mock exams with auto mistake collection
login.feature3: Spaced repetition vocab cards with smart scheduling
login.feature4: Sentence-level shadowing with real-time pronunciation feedback
login.formSubtitle: Enter your credentials to start learning
login.demoNotice: Only Email + Password required by default. Tenant Code is only needed for multi-tenant login.
login.orgSummary: Organization (only for registration or multi-tenant login)
login.registerTip: Registration uses the Email and Password above.
login.accountTip: Note: `demo / owner@demo.com` is for testing and contains historical data — not ideal for a fresh learning account.
writing.title: English Writing Practice
writing.subtitle: Enter your English text and AI will evaluate vocabulary, grammar, and structure.
writing.subtitleJa: Enter your Japanese text and AI will evaluate content development, cohesion, and natural phrasing.
writing.placeholderJa: Start writing your Japanese response here...
writing.focusContentReason: Build up ideas and source material first, then return to writing with more to say.
writing.focusOrganizationReason: Strengthen transitions and structure first, then come back to writing with a cleaner flow.
writing.focusLanguageReason: Reinforce grammar and expression control first, then return to writing with fewer sentence-level errors.
writing.submitFailed: Failed to submit evaluation. Please try again.
grammarJlpt.title: JLPT Grammar Cards
grammarJlpt.subtitle: When the target language is Japanese, the grammar tab switches to JLPT grammar cards with spaced review.
grammarJlpt.empty: No JLPT grammar cards are available yet.
grammarJlpt.loadFailed: Failed to load JLPT grammar cards.
grammarJlpt.gradeFailed: Failed to update the JLPT grammar card grade.
readingJlpt.title: JLPT Reading Practice
readingJlpt.subtitle: When the target language is Japanese, the reading tab switches to short JLPT reading passages with hints.
upgrade.title: Usage Limit Reached
upgrade.hint: Upgrade to a higher plan to unlock more features and usage.
upgrade.adHint: Or watch a short video ad for additional practice opportunities
